title: SENSARTE Black Crepe Pan 30 cm Non-Stick Pan Omlette Pan Pancake Flat Pan with Swiss Granite Non-Stick Coating, Bakelite Handle, Induction Compatible, PFOA PFOS Free
features: Healthy non-stick coating. Swiss ILAG non-stick coating, 100% non-toxic, PFOA PFOS free, free from lead, cadmium and other toxic substances that can leach into food, safe for you, your family and the environment.

Suitable for all types of cookers - Thanks to the highly magnetic, conductive stainless steel base, you can use the pancake pan on all types of cookers, including induction. The core of the crêpe pan is made of die-cast aluminium, which is durable and heats up quickly and evenly

Perfect flat pan - Large diameter of 30 cm for crepes that satisfy even the greatest appetite; rim around the edge to prevent the liquid from leaking; 1.4 cm high rim that makes it easier to turn the crepes. Perfect for crepes, pancakes, omelettes, tortillas and more

Lightweight and safe - weighs 1.1 kg. This non-stick omelette pan is light enough to make flipping crêpes easy and move around the kitchen; its heat-resistant Bakelite handle is suitable for gripping and stays cool while cooking. Oven-safe up to 150°C
Easy to clean - The pancake pan is non-stick and has no rivets, so it is very easy to clean. Simply wipe it with a sponge and warm soapy water. Make it easier to prepare your daily meals
description: SENSARTE Crepe Pan 26 cm Non-Stick Pan Omlette Pan Pancake Flat Pan with Swiss Granite Non-Stick Coating, Bakelite Handle, Induction Compatible, Free from Intentionally Added PFOA
